# API route inventory

Every HTTP route the backend serves, walked from the live chi router so it cannot drift from the code. Regenerate with `make api-routes` after changing any handler's `Mount`. The generator enables both identity providers, so provider-gated routes (`AUTH_GOOGLE_ENABLED` / `AUTH_LOCAL_ENABLED`, ADR-0039) appear here even when a given deployment mounts only one.

Response envelope and error shapes are the ADR-0027 `httperr` contract; auth and session semantics are ADR-0038/0039. See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for the request flow these routes sit in.

151 routes.
